data.name: SubTitle
data.value: Sabuuradda wargelinta dhijitaalka ah ee tooska ah ee adeegyada muhiimka ah ee magaalada, helitaanka caafimaadka, iyo qiimaha suuqa beeraha.

data.name: SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Halkan ku qor si aad u shaandhayso rugaha caafimaadka, jadwalka biyaha, ama shaqooyinka...
